projects.title: Homelab Kubernetes Platform as Code
projects.summary: End-to-end platform provisioning with Terraform and Helm modules for ingress, monitoring, policy controls, backup tooling, and service hardening.

projects.title: Progressive Delivery with Argo Rollouts
projects.summary: Blue/green rollout pipeline for portfolio services with pre-promotion analysis templates backed by Prometheus success-rate and latency checks.

projects.title: Operational Resilience and Backup Verification
projects.summary: Automated backup generation and verification workflows, remote-state-aware snapshot logic, and tested restore guidance to improve disaster recovery confidence.

projects.title: Security and Policy Enforcement
projects.summary: Namespace security baselines, network isolation, quota controls, and admission policy rollout patterns that can graduate from audit to enforce safely.
